# KenshiMP Host Package

Use this package if you want to play and host from the same PC.

## Install

1. Extract this zip anywhere.
2. Run `install.bat`.
3. If the installer cannot find Kenshi, enter the folder that contains `kenshi_x64.exe`.
4. Launch Kenshi normally.
5. Click `MULTIPLAYER`, then `HOST GAME`.

## Included

- Everything in the player package.
- `KenshiMP.Server.exe`, so the in-game `HOST GAME` button can start a local server.
- `server.json`, the default server configuration.

The default game port is UDP `27800`. The server tries UPnP automatically. If UPnP is unavailable, forward UDP `27800` to this PC.
